subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Thou didst seek deliverance from the ocean of bewilderment, yet this station the Seal of the Prophets sought from God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی از بحر حیرت نجات طلبیدی و لکن این مقام را خاتم انبیا از حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @Muhammad; Islam, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
